<!--
.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md
Standardizes pull request scope, validation evidence, and release-impact reporting.
Connects to: CONTRIBUTING.md, GitHub Actions, README.md, and CHANGELOG.md.
Created: 2026-06-18
-->

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`
- [ ] Desktop workflow tested manually
- [ ] Mobile workflow tested manually
- [ ] No secrets or generated artifacts included

## Documentation

- [ ] Tests added or updated where appropriate
- [ ] `README.md` updated
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated

## Release Impact

Describe deployment changes, migrations, known limitations, or state `None`.
